chapter_title.en: Chapter 171 – The one who misses the Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/139)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/139)
text: مَنْ أَدْرَكَ الْمَشْعَرَ الْحَرَامَ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ مِنْ قَبْلِ زَوَالِ الشَّمْسِ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ الْحَجَّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who arrives at the Sacred Monuments on the day of the sacrifice, from before the (start of the) decline of the sun, so he has accomplished the Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One who attends al-Mash‘ar al-Haram on the day of al- Nahr (slaughtering the offering) before Zawal (declining of the sun toward the west at noontime) he has attended al-Hajj. ‘“
